zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh於1287年出生在英國英格蘭素可布瓦申時，他的父親Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh21歲，母親Margaret Maud de Badlesmere21歲。他於1320年6月11日與Countess Elizabeth de Verdun在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他於1355年被列為constable of the tower of london。他去世於1355年8月3日在英國肯特多福 卡素享年68歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh于1287年出生在英国英格兰素可布瓦申时，他的父亲Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh21岁，母亲Margaret Maud de Badlesmere21岁。他于1320年6月11日与Countess Elizabeth de Verdun在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他于1355年被列为constable of the tower of london。他去世于1355年8月3日在英国肯特多福 卡素享年68岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh was born in 1287, in Burwash, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, was 21. He married Countess Elizabeth de Verdun on 11 June 1320, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1346. In 1355, at the age of 68, his occupation is listed as constable of the tower of london. He died on 3 August 1355, in Dover Castle, Kent, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh est né en 1287, à Burwash, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Countess Elizabeth de Verdun le 11 juin 1320, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. En 1355, à l’âge de 68 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of the tower of london. Il est décédé le 3 août 1355, à Dover Castle, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.East Worldham, Alton, Hampshire, England: East Worldham, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 1287 in Burwash, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Maud de Badlesmere 21. Er hat am 11. Juni 1320 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Countess Elizabeth de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1355, als er 68 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of the tower of london aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. August 1355 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Dover Castle, Kent, England und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh è nato il nel 1287 nel Burwash, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Countess Elizabeth de Verdun il 11 giugno 1320, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Nel 1355, all'età di 68 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of the tower of london. Morì il 3 agosto 1355, nel Dover Castle, Kent, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershが1287年にイギリスイギリススセックスブルワッシュで生まれた時，父Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは21歳，母Margaret Maud de Badlesmereは21歳であった。1320年6月11日にイギリスイギリススセックスでCountess Elizabeth de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。1355年，68歳の時，職業はconstable of the tower of londonと記録されている。彼は1355年8月3日にイギリスケントドバー カストルで68歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(이)가 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버와시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Maud de Badlesmere(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1320년 6월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Countess Elizabeth de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1355년, 68세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of the tower of london이었다. 그는 1355년 8월 3일 영국 켄트 도버 카스틀에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh nasceu em 1287, em Burwash, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Elizabeth de Verdun em 11 de junho de 1320, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Em 1355, com 68 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of the tower of london. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1355, em Dover Castle, Kent, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh родился в 1287 г. в местности бурваш, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Elizabeth de Verdun 11 июня 1320 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1355 году, в возрасте 68 лет, работал по профессии constable of the tower of london. Он умер 3 августа 1355 г. в местности довир кастл, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh nació en 1287, en Burwash, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Countess Elizabeth de Verdun el 11 de junio de 1320, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. En 1355, a la edad de 68 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of the tower of london. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1355, en Dover Castle, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
